use_cases: Toggle between display modes or view options in a settings panel
Select a single option from a group of related choices
Switch between tabs or categories in a navigation context
Toggle boolean settings with grouped semantic options
Create a pill-style radio button group with optional icons
ai_summary: A segmented control switch component that functions like a group of radio buttons styled as an interconnected pill control. Supports three sizes (small, medium, large), optional icons per control, and disabled states. Uses React Context for state management, making it self-contained and easy to integrate into forms or settings interfaces. Clean flat design with subtle borders and rounded corners for a modern, minimalist aesthetic.
